nws.name: Overnight

nws.shortForecast: Partly Sunny then Chance Rain Showers
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers after 4pm. Partly sunny. High near 66, with temperatures falling to around 60 in the afternoon. North wind 2 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.
